mission.title: helm: add support for weighted manifests
mission.description:
**What this PR does / why we need it**:
Allows overriding the default manifest sort order by annotation.
Closes https://github.com/helm/helm/issues/8439

* The annotation: `helm.sh/order-weight`, if defined in a given manifest will influence the sorted order.
* Lower weighted manifests will be applied prior to higher weighted manifests.
* A value of 0 is assumed if the annotation is missing or not parseable.
* Manifests of the same order weight will leverage the existing sorting logic.

**Special notes for your reviewer**:

Prior work:
- https://github.com/helm/helm/pull/9534
- https://github.com/helm/helm/pull/8448

**If applicable**:
- [ ] this PR contains documentation
- [x] this PR contains unit tests
- [x] this PR has been tested for backwards compatibility

steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
